Tower of Babel

You are the Traveler, exploring a mystical tower inhabited by three ancient Peoples who speak different languages. Your mission is to decipher their unique glyphs by observing context clues, collecting symbols, and matching them to their meanings. Successfully translate all glyphs from each culture to unite the Peoples and reach the top of the Tower. Watch for visual clues, interact with NPCs, and use your notebook to track discoveries!

Arrow Keys: Move the Traveler through the tower
Space: Interact with NPCs and objects to collect glyphs
Z: Open/close your translation notebook to match glyphs with meanings
Shift: Sprint to move faster through the tower

// Update glyph objects gameState.glyphObjects.forEach(obj => obj.update(p)); } function renderGame(p) { p.push(); // Draw current floor const currentFloor = gameState.floors[gameState.currentFloor]; if (currentFloor) { currentFloor.draw(p); // Draw entities on current floor currentFloor.npcs.forEach(npc => npc.draw(p)); currentFloor.glyphObjects.forEach(obj => obj.draw(p)); } // Draw player if (gameState.player) { gameState.player.draw(p); Tower of Babel

You are the Traveler, exploring a mystical tower inhabited by three ancient Peoples who speak different languages. Your mission is to decipher their unique glyphs by observing context clues, collecting symbols, and matching them to their meanings. Successfully translate all glyphs from each culture to unite the Peoples and reach the top of the Tower. Watch for visual clues, interact with NPCs, and use your notebook to track discoveries!

Arrow Keys: Move the Traveler through the tower
Space: Interact with NPCs and objects to collect glyphs
Z: Open/close your translation notebook to match glyphs with meanings
Shift: Sprint to move faster through the tower
